name: restaurant_faq
notes: We spoke with 6 restaurant owners. They spend hours answering repeated questions about opening hours, menu items, allergies, reservations, and delivery across Instagram, phone, and Google reviews. They want something simple, not a full CRM.

name: healthcare_intake_privacy
notes: A small clinic wants to turn messy patient intake notes and follow-up messages into a triage workflow. Staff handle protected health data and must never give medical advice automatically; urgent cases need flagging.

name: saas_support_backlog
notes: Our SaaS support team gets repeated tickets that should become product backlog items. We want to convert support themes into a prioritized backlog without overbuilding.
